releaseNotes: Adds a conversion-craft lane adapted from Corey Haines' marketingskills (MIT, © Corey Haines 2025) where the skill was genuinely thin, without duplicating lanes it already covers deeply.

Adds references/conversion-copy.md: conversion copywriting and copy-editing craft (voice-of-customer mining, message hierarchy, claims ledger, per-surface recipes) producing COPY_BRIEF.md so one promise carries across landing, App Store, paywall, email, and screenshots.

Adds references/cro-landing.md: public-funnel CRO structure (one conversion goal, above-the-fold promise/CTA/proof, trust placement, mobile-viewport + Core Web Vitals, friction audit) producing CRO_AUDIT.md — distinct from the in-app onboarding-conversion lane.

Folds an experiment-design discipline into analytics-attribution.md (falsifiable hypothesis, minimum detectable effect, sample sizing, the low-traffic indie-launch reality, anti-peeking and guardrail rules) so copy/CRO A/B tests are not reported as winners when underpowered.

Wires the new lane into SKILL.md routing (rule 18a + Phase 2/Phase 4 flow), the launch-coverage matrix (Conversion copy, Landing CRO rows), artifact-contracts (COPY_BRIEF.md, CRO_AUDIT.md), and source-registry.yaml with MIT attribution; intentionally skips marketing skills already covered (paid UA, viral loops, onboarding, ASO, email, GEO/SEO, pricing) and out-of-scope B2B skills (cold-email, prospecting, revops, sales-enablement).
